channel.title: about on Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content in about on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: Developing for better productivities and user experiences
item.description: Hi, my name is Jae. I’m working as a Pipeline TD at ICON Creative Studio, Vancouver, Canada. I have worked on 3D Animation industry for about 4 years. My career was started as lighter and compositor and then kept moving to the technical side step by step. I like learning and digging something new. My interests are shading, rendering and cutting-edge real time related technology. I love animations, cool designs, and technologies which are associated to visuals.
